# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts";

type Json = Record<string, unknown>;

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

function jsonResponse(status: number, body: unknown, headers: HeadersInit = {}) {
  const h = new Headers(headers);
  if (!h.has("content-type")) h.set("content-type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
  h.set("cache-control", "no-store");
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), { status, headers: h });
}

function errorResponse(status: number, message: string, details?: unknown) {
  return jsonResponse(status, { ok: false, error: { message, details } });
}

function parseBodyJson(req: Request): Promise<Json> {
  const ct = req.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
  if (!ct.toLowerCase().includes("application/json")) return Promise.resolve({});
  return req.json().catch(() => ({}));
}

function getPathParts(url: URL) {
  return url.pathname.split("/").filter(Boolean);
}

function sanitizeId(s: string) {
  const v = s.trim();
  if (!v) return null;
  if (v.length > 200) return null;
  if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$/.test(v)) return null;
  return v;
}

function parseLimit(v: string | null, def = 50, max = 200) {
  if (!v) return def;
  const n = Number(v);
  if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0) return def;
  return Math.min(Math.floor(n), max);
}

function parseCursor(v: string | null) {
  if (!v) return undefined;
  try {
    return JSON.parse(atob(v));
  } catch {
    return undefined;
  }
}

function encodeCursor(cursor: unknown) {
  return btoa(JSON.stringify(cursor));
}

function normalizeFilterValue(v: string) {
  const t = v.trim();
  if (t === "") return null;
  if (t.length > 500) return null;
  const low = t.toLowerCase();
  if (low === "true") return true;
  if (low === "false") return false;
  if (/^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$/.test(t)) {
    const n = Number(t);
    if (Number.isFinite(n)) return n;
  }
  return t;
}

function buildUserKeyExact(userId: string, filterField: string, filterValue: unknown) {
  return ["users", userId, filterField, filterValue] as const;
}

function buildUserKeyPrefix(userId: string, filterField?: string) {
  if (filterField) return ["users", userId, filterField] as const;
  return ["users", userId] as const;
}

function toUserIdFromKey(key: Deno.KvKey): string | null {
  if (!Array.isArray(key)) return null;
  if (key.length < 2) return null;
  if (key[0] !== "users") return null;
  const id = key[1];
  return typeof id === "string" ? id : null;
}

function splitFiltersFromParams(params: URLSearchParams, reserved: Set<string>) {
  const filters: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  for (const [k, v] of params.entries()) {
    if (reserved.has(k)) continue;
    const field = k.trim();
    if (!field) continue;
    if (field.length > 100) continue;
    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9_.:-]+$/.test(field)) continue;
    const nv = normalizeFilterValue(v);
    if (nv === null) continue;
    filters[field] = nv;
  }
  return filters;
}

async function putUser(req: Request, url: URL) {
  const parts = getPathParts(url);
  if (parts.length !== 2 || parts[0] !== "users") return errorResponse(404, "Not found");
  const userId = sanitizeId(parts[1]);
  if (!userId) return errorResponse(400, "Invalid userId");

  const body = await parseBodyJson(req);
  const data = (body?.data && typeof body.data === "object") ? (body.data as Json) : (body as Json);
  const filters = (body?.filters && typeof body.filters === "object") ? (body.filters as Json) : (data.filters as Json | undefined);

  if (!data || typeof data !== "object") return errorResponse(400, "Invalid JSON body");

  const baseKey = ["user", userId] as const;
  const baseSet = kv.set(baseKey, { userId, ...data });

  const ops: Array<Promise<Deno.KvCommitResult>> = [];
  ops.push(baseSet);

  if (filters && typeof filters === "object") {
    for (const [field, rawVal] of Object.entries(filters)) {
      const f = field.trim();
      if (!f || f.length > 100) continue;
      if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9_.:-]+$/.test(f)) continue;

      let val: unknown = rawVal;
      if (typeof val === "string") val = normalizeFilterValue(val) ?? "";
      if (val === "" || val === null || typeof val === "undefined") continue;

      const idxKey = buildUserKeyExact(userId, f, val);
      ops.push(kv.set(idxKey, { userId, field: f, value: val }));
    }
  }

  await Promise.all(ops);

  return jsonResponse(200, { ok: true, userId });
}

async function getUser(req: Request, url: URL) {
  const parts = getPathParts(url);
  if (parts.length !== 2 || parts[0] !== "users") return errorResponse(404, "Not found");
  const userId = sanitizeId(parts[1]);
  if (!userId) return errorResponse(400, "Invalid userId");

  const baseKey = ["user", userId] as const;
  const res = await kv.get(baseKey);
  if (!res.value) return errorResponse(404, "User not found");
  return jsonResponse(200, { ok: true, user: res.value });
}

async function searchUsers(req: Request, url: URL) {
  const reserved = new Set(["limit", "cursor", "userId", "field", "value", "fields", "mode"]);
  const params = url.searchParams;

  const limit = parseLimit(params.get("limit"), 50, 200);
  const cursor = parseCursor(params.get("cursor"));

  const userIdParam = params.get("userId");
  const userId = userIdParam ? sanitizeId(userIdParam) : null;

  const mode = (params.get("mode") ?? "and").toLowerCase();
  const andMode = mode !== "or";

  const explicitField = params.get("field")?.trim() ?? "";
  const explicitValueRaw = params.get("value");

  let filters: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  if (explicitField && explicitValueRaw !== null) {
    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9_.:-]+$/.test(explicitField)) return errorResponse(400, "Invalid field");
    const nv = normalizeFilterValue(explicitValueRaw);
    if (nv === null) return errorResponse(400, "Invalid value");
    filters[explicitField] = nv;
  } else {
    filters = splitFiltersFromParams(params, reserved);
  }

  const filterEntries = Object.entries(filters);

  // Efficient lookups:
  // 1) If userId + exactly one filter => exact key get.
  // 2) If userId + one filter with any value unspecified (field only) => prefix list.
  // 3) Otherwise:
  //    - If userId provided: list prefixes per filter and intersect/union locally.
  //    - If userId not provided: require at least one filter; list across all users for that field/value via prefix scan on ["users"] is not possible efficiently with this key scheme.
  //      We'll return 400 unless a userId is provided, to keep edge lookups efficient.
  if (!userId) {
    return errorResponse(
      400,
      "userId is required for efficient search with this key scheme",
      { hint: "Provide userId and filter params; keys are indexed as ['users', userId, field, value]" },
    );
  }

  if (filterEntries.length === 0) {
    // List all indexes for a user (or could list the user record)
    const iter = kv.list({ prefix: buildUserKeyPrefix(userId) }, { limit, cursor });
    const results: Array<{ userId: string; field: string; value: unknown }> = [];
    let lastCursor: unknown = undefined;

    for await (const entry of iter) {
      lastCursor = (iter as any).cursor ?? undefined;
      const key = entry.key;
      const f = key[2];
      const v = key[3];
      if (typeof f === "string") results.push({ userId, field: f, value: v });
    }

    const nextCursor = (iter as any).cursor;
    return jsonResponse(200, {
      ok: true,
      mode: "list",
      userId,
      results,
      nextCursor: nextCursor ? encodeCursor(nextCursor) : null,
    });
  }

  if (filterEntries.length === 1) {
    const [field, value] = filterEntries[0];
    const exactKey = buildUserKeyExact(userId, field, value);
    const got = await kv.get(exactKey);
    if (!got.value) {
      return jsonResponse(200, { ok: true, userId, matches: [], nextCursor: null });
    }
    return jsonResponse(200, {
      ok: true,
      userId,
      matches: [{ userId, field, value }],
      nextCursor: null,
    });
  }

  // Multi-filter: list each filter prefix and combine locally
  const perFilterMatches = await Promise.all(
    filterEntries.map(async ([field, value]) => {
      const iter = kv.list({ prefix: buildUserKeyPrefix(userId, field) }, { limit: 1000 });
      const set = new Set<string>();
      for await (const entry of iter) {
        const key = entry.key;
        if (key.length < 4) continue;
        const kField = key[2];
        const kValue = key[3];
        if (kField !== field) continue;
        if (kValue === value) set.add(userId);
      }
      return set;
    }),
  );

  let combined = new Set<string>();
  if (andMode) {
    combined = perFilterMatches[0] ?? new Set();
    for (let i = 1; i < perFilterMatches.length; i++) {
      const s = perFilterMatches[i];
      const next = new Set<string>();
      for (const id of combined) if (s.has(id)) next.add(id);
      combined = next;
    }
  } else {
    combined = new Set<string>();
    for (const s of perFilterMatches) for (const id of s) combined.add(id);
  }

  const ids = Array.from(combined);
  const page = ids.slice(0, limit);

  const users = await Promise.all(
    page.map(async (id) => {
      const u = await kv.get(["user", id] as const);
      return u.value ?? { userId: id };
    }),
  );

  return jsonResponse(200, {
    ok: true,
    userId,
    mode: andMode ? "and" : "or",
    filters,
    count: users.length,
    users,
    nextCursor: null,
  });
}

async function route(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const parts = getPathParts(url);

  if (req.method === "GET" && parts.length === 1 && parts[0] === "health") {
    return jsonResponse(200, { ok: true });
  }

  if (req.method === "PUT" && parts.length === 2 && parts[0] === "users") {
    return await putUser(req, url);
  }

  if (req.method === "GET" && parts.length === 2 && parts[0] === "users") {
    return await getUser(req, url);
  }

  if (req.method === "GET" && parts.length === 1 && parts[0] === "search") {
    return await searchUsers(req, url);
  }

  return errorResponse(404, "Not found");
}

serve(route);
